name: Rice Chex Candy Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar and Karo syrup in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Boil until it reaches a rolling boil, then remove from the stove.
3. Stir in the vanilla and peanut butter until well combined.
4. Spread an even layer of the mixture on wax paper.
5. Sprinkle chopped pecans evenly over the top of the sugar mixture.
6. Sprinkle Rice Chex cereal over the pecans.
7. Allow to cool completely before breaking into pieces or cutting into bars.
